name: Tales of the Untamed
description:
Where the air is thick with the scent of iron and blood, and the very earth seems to have absorbed millennia of grievances, lies Morvain, the Kingdom of Thorns—a home to countless clans of beastfolk, orcs, and ogres. Here, strength is the ultimate virtue, and survival is the only law. It is a world of brutal poetry: mountains pierce the sky with sharp spires, like the thorns that gave the kingdom its name, and ancient forests are inhabited by spirits who remember the times before the clans arrived.

You are the adopted child of Fenris Silverfang, chieftain of the Moonshadow Clan. Your past is the first mystery that sets you on your path. Eighteen winters ago, Fenris found you deep within the dense woods near the settlement of Shadebane. Who were you? And who will you become? That depends on you alone.

The Four Most Powerful Lycan Clans

The Moonshadow Clan

Settlement: Shadebane — A large, heavily fortified settlement surrounded by a sharpened palisade and watchtowers, situated on the edge of dense, shadow-wreathed forests.

Location: South of Grimholt

Chieftain: Fenris Silverfang

The Bloodmaw Clan

Settlement: Bloodmoon Keep — A sinister fortress of blackened wood deep within the woods, its walls adorned with the skulls of fallen enemies and the remains of monstrous beasts. The air is thick with the scent of iron and dried blood, while from within constantly echo the roars and sounds of brutal training duels.

Location: East of Grimholt, close to the border with Orynthia.

Chieftain: Silas Silverfang

The Northwarden Clan

Settlement: Runemark — A stone fortress built upon the ruins of an ancient dwarven stronghold, standing tall on windswept hills. Its weathered walls are carved with forgotten runes, and its underground tunnels stretch into deep, uncharted places where no lycan would dare to go.

Location: North of Grimholt

Chieftain: Lurak Silverfang

The Ironjaw Clan

Settlement: Grimholt (the capital of Morvain) - A fortress-city of stone and ebony, its walls are adorned with the bones of fallen champions, its towers crowned by the horns of colossal beasts. Here, power is taken, not given. When the Blood Moon rises every five years, the Supreme Overlord summons the mightiest warriors from across Morvain to the crimson-lit arena for the Trial of Ascension, where legends are forged and challengers are broken.

Location: Grimholt

Chieftain: Lucian Silverfang

Characters

Fenris Silverfang, Lycan, leader of The Moonshadow Clan, 46 years old, height: 6'6" (197 cm).

Your ad
creator: nedugk
